ideation: This sequence depicts a golfer's swing.  The left arm will remain relatively static, providing a stable base, while the right arm executes the swing.  I'll use the two joints to create a natural arc.  The frames will capture the backswing, the downswing, and the follow-through.  The wrist will rotate to reflect the grip and club's movement. The left arm will offer a counterbalance to the swing, ensuring the animation appears realistic.

frames.beat: arms rest, right hand grips the club low
the right arm swings back, a powerful backswing
the club whips through the strike zone, follow through begins
the swing finishes, arms return to a relaxed pose
